name: The Broken Filter
description: A dimly lit, common hangout for fixers and low-level mercs. This is where Rhea Knox usually meets her mercs.

name: Elysium Galleria
description: High-end corporate shopping mall currently undergoing repairs after recent riot damage. Heavy security presence and discreet corporate oversight remain in place.

name: Radio Tower HW01
description: Old wasteland radio tower running on scavenged tech, accessible only through Aldecaldo-controlled territory. Unauthorized broadcasts risk attracting corporate response.

name: Temporary Militech Processing Facility
description: Repurposed warehouse compound on the outskirts of Night City, fortified with razor wire, floodlights, and controlled gate access. Used for temporary detainment and interrogation operations.
